name: OurGolf Club
about: OurGolf Club is an indoor golf venue equipped with modern simulation technology, allowing golfers to play and practice year-round regardless of weather conditions. The facility utilizes advanced software and hardware to provide an accurate representation of real-world golf courses, offering a digital alternative to traditional play. The venue accepts various digital payment methods, including Apple Pay and Google Pay, indicating a focus on convenience and modern accessibility. The space is designed to accommodate different types of players, providing an environment where both practice and entertainment can coexist.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While we do not have specific information on rentals, most indoor golf venues provide clubs for rent if you do not have your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Most indoor golf facilities allow you to bring your own snacks and non-alcoholic beverages, but it is best to confirm with the venue directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On a simulator, an 18-hole round typically takes between 45 minutes to an hour per player, depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, indoor golf simulators are generally family-friendly and suitable for juniors, offering a controlled environment for learning the game.
